name: Crab Cakes with Sweet Peppers & Capers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red, yellow and green bell peppers julienned, 2-inch long
recipeInstructions:
1. Making the batter: Using a small whisk, combine the flour with eggs and milk. Strain through a fine strainer to remove any lumps. Add thyme, scallion, parsley, and Tabasco. Season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
2. Note: Batter can be made up to this point in advance and refrigerated until ready to use.
3. Just before cooking the crab cakes, add crab meat and baking powder to the batter, mixing gently with a wooden spoon.
4. To cook the crab cakes, heat 2 oz of clarified butter in a large frying pan over medium heat. Using a 2-oz ladle, form three cakes at a time. Fry gently on one side for 2 minutes, then turn and cook another 2 minutes. Keep cakes warm while cooking additional batches.
5. When serving crab cakes, spread 1/4 cup of warm beurre blanc on each plate. Arrange 3 cakes per serving and top with the julienned peppers and chives. Sprinkle capers around the cakes; serve.
Suggested wines: Farniente Chardonnay.
